texto: Books can be dangerous. The best ones should be labeled ‘This could change your life’.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Helen Exley sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Books can be dangerous. The best ones should be labeled ‘This could change your life’.” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, books, change, útil em momentos de mudanca e inspiracao.

texto: The house-cat is a four-legged quadruped, the legs as usual being at the corners. It is what is sometimes called a tame animal, though it feeds on mice and birds of prey. Its colours are striped, it does not bark, but breathes through its nose instead of its mouth. Cats also mow, which you all have heard.
